Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER ROEBUCK Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaintis GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JENNIFER ROEBUCK'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED without prejudice for Plaintiff to promptly file a Motion for Leave to Amend in compliance with CRC 3.1324 and reflecting the facts and procedural posture of this case. (Points and Authorities reference filing of a Second Amended Complaint while this is a motion for leave to file a First Amended Complaint). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Aug-09-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER ROEBUCK'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Continued to be heard in Dept. 501 on August 9, 2021 at the same time. Dept. 501 handles all matters related to the possession of real property under Local Rule 8.10. Parties are to provide Dept. 501 courtesy copies by August 3.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
